answer: Metadata extraction success rate was impacted because the concept frontmatter parser skipped non-index markdown. The canary metadata comes from yaml_frontmatter, not body_text_only, in md_frontmatter_ingest_v1; remediation is to enable parsing of YAML frontmatter on non-index Markdown files.

facts.remediation: enable parsing of YAML frontmatter on non-index Markdown files
facts.root_cause: concept frontmatter parser skipped non-index markdown
